step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the transcript and whiteboard image, Love Bonito's Magento e-commerce platform uses CloudFront to distribute content. Users go through CloudFront, which either fetches static content from S3 or routes dynamic requests to EC2 running Varnish. Varnish forwards cache misses to EKS. EKS pulls container images from ECR and hosts the Magento workload (split into web app, cron, and admin). EKS interacts with ElastiCache (Redis) and Aurora MySQL. EKS also mounts S3 as a local filesystem using S3Fuse. The flows are split into static content retrieval, dynamic requests, and image deployment.

graph.name: Love Bonito Omnichannel E-Commerce Architecture
graph.notes: Magento-based e-commerce platform migrated to EKS. Features S3Fuse for mounting S3 buckets and Varnish on EC2 as a cache layer.

nodes.name: Users
nodes.notes: Global e-commerce customers accessing the site.

nodes.name: CloudFront CDN
nodes.notes: Caches static assets and routes dynamic content requests.

nodes.name: Varnish Cache on EC2
nodes.notes: Runs Varnish in front of Magento to optimize response caching.

nodes.name: EKS
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Hosts Magento split into cron jobs, admin panel, and web applications.

nodes.name: ECR
nodes.notes: Stores container images for Magento services.

nodes.name: Aurora MySQL
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Stores business transaction data. Multi-AZ deployment with Read Replicas.

nodes.name: ElastiCache Redis
nodes.notes: Caches database query results from Aurora MySQL.

nodes.name: S3 Bucket
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Shared filesystem mounted on EKS pods via S3Fuse; also serves assets through CloudFront.

edges.notes: Request routed to Varnish caching proxy.
Cache miss forwarded to Magento application pods on EKS.
Reads/writes media assets via S3Fuse mount.
EKS checks Redis cache for data query.
Direct query to Aurora MySQL database on cache miss.
Magento application responds with rendered page data.
Varnish passes cached payload back to CDN.
Dynamic page delivered back to end-user.
EKS retrieves images from ECR during deployment.
